name: slides
description: Markdown → keynote-grade single-file HTML deck. Two modes: (A) transcription — renders a ready .md faithfully, never invents text; (B) explainer — drives the didactics (narrative structure, audience level, granular vs summary, infographics) to teach a concept, grounded (factual + current). Theme system (VIU default), no-JS adaptive (WhatsApp thumbnail).
